Sandbox_PZNS_Framework_IsDebugModeActive: Check to activate, uncheck to deactivate
Sandbox_PZNS_Framework_IsInfiniteAmmoAct: Check to activate, uncheck to deactivate - NPCs will have keep shooting without needing ammo in inventory if activated
Sandbox_PZNS_Framework_HideNpcNameTags_t: Check to activate, uncheck to deactivate - NPCs names wont be visible if activated
Sandbox_PZNS_Framework_IsNPCsNeedsActive: (WIP)Check to activate, uncheck to deactivate - NPCs will need food and water if activated
Sandbox_PZNS_Framework_GroupSizeLimit_to: (WIP)Sets the limit of NPCs a group may have
Sandbox_PZNS_Framework_CompanionFollowRa: Sets the distance at which NPCs will try to follow the player
Sandbox_PZNS_Framework_CompanionRunRange: Sets the distance at which NPCs will start running to catch up
Sandbox_PZNS_Framework_CompanionIdleTick: (WIP)Sets the Tick counter at which NPCs will begin idle behaviors
Sandbox_PZNS_Framework_ShouldNpcFlee_too: If true, NPCs will flee from X amount of zombies
Sandbox_PZNS_Framework_Zombieamountforfl: Amount Of Zombies NPCs Should Flee From
If there are more zombies than the amount given zombies will flee
Sandbox_PZNS_Framework_meleeTicks_toolti: Sets the Tick counter at which NPCs will attack with melees
Sandbox_PZNS_Framework_rangedTicks_toolt: Sets the Tick counter at which NPCs will shoot enemies
